title: Strange objects
description: "Strange Object" is my mod that adds memes or strange objects.
body:
**📖Welcome to the world of absurdity and unrestrained fun! The "Strange Objects" mod opens up a whole world of mysterious and incredible things in Minecraft that will change your perception of reality.**

Embark on an exciting adventure with a flying baguette, which will become a reliable defense against enemies. Experiment with other amazing objects that will make you laugh and wonder.

## What does this mod add?
- **Flying Baguette**
(It will give you the ability to fly it.)
- **Cat Cannon**
(In version 0.2 will be added. 
Safely Spawn cats.)
- Other items will be added later.
## Why do you need this mod?
This mod was made to have fun with friends and have fun with game. 

## ⚙️The mod installation process.
**Install Forge:**
- Download and install Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1 from the official site.
- Launch the game using the Forge profile once to generate necessary files.

**Download Dependencies:**

- mod GeckoLib
- Stranget objects.jar

**Install the Mod:**
- Open the Minecraft directory (press Win + R, type %appdata%\.minecraft).
- Navigate to the mods folder (create it if missing).
- Place both GeckoLib and Strange Items (.jar) files into the folder.
**Launch the Game.**
- Enjoy the chaos!
